description: Validates a navigation path against geofence boundaries and known/unknown obstacles. Returns whether the path is blocked and the reason. Use before executing any navigation to ensure safety.

in.name: path
in.description: The planned navigation path to validate against the geofence map

out.name: blocked
out.description: True if the path intersects obstacles or exits geofence boundaries

out.name: message
out.description: Human-readable reason if blocked, empty if safe
